程序包 edu.bupt.ta.service

类 JobService

java.lang.Object
edu.bupt.ta.service.JobService
public class JobService extends Object
Provides business-logic operations for job postings. Handles job CRUD, filtering by organiser, and the skill-match scoring algorithm used to rank jobs for TA users.

  • 构造器概要

  • 构造器详细资料

    • JobService

      public JobService()

  • 方法详细资料

    • getAllJobs

      public List<Job> getAllJobs()
      Returns all jobs from the CSV, regardless of status.
      返回:
      a list of all jobs

    • getOpenJobs

      public List<Job> getOpenJobs()
      Returns all jobs whose status is OPEN.
      返回:
      a list of open jobs

    • getJobsByOrganiser

      public List<Job> getJobsByOrganiser(String organiser)
      Returns all jobs whose organiser matches the given name (case-insensitive).
      参数:
      organiser - the MO's display name
      返回:
      a list of jobs created by that organiser

    • getOpenJobsByOrganiser

      public List<Job> getOpenJobsByOrganiser(String organiser)
      参数:
      organiser - the organiser name to filter by
      返回:
      all OPEN jobs whose organiser matches the given name

    • getOpenJobsForUser

      public List<Job> getOpenJobsForUser(User user)
      Returns all OPEN jobs with a matchScore for the given TA user, sorted by score descending. The matchScore is calculated by calculateMatchScore(java.lang.String, java.lang.String) and set directly on each Job object before sorting.
      参数:
      user - the TA user (may be null; all jobs will have score 0 in that case)
      返回:
      open jobs sorted by match score descending

    • findById

      public Job findById(String jobId)
      Looks up a job by its ID.
      参数:
      jobId - the job ID (e.g. "J001")
      返回:
      the Job, or null if not found

    • createJob

      public Job createJob(String title, String moduleCode, String organiser, int minYear, int maxYear, int hours, String requiredSkills, String deadline, int vacancies)
      Creates and persists a new job posting. Assigns the next sequential job ID, sets status to OPEN, and normalises the requiredSkills field.
      参数:
      title - job title
      moduleCode - course module code
      organiser - the MO's display name (must match their user record)
      minYear - minimum academic year required (1-based)
      maxYear - maximum academic year allowed (1-based)
      hours - expected weekly working hours
      requiredSkills - pipe-separated skill list
      deadline - application deadline in "yyyy-MM-dd" format
      vacancies - number of open positions
      返回:
      the newly created Job

    • countTotalJobs

      public int countTotalJobs()
      返回:
      the total number of jobs in the CSV

    • countActiveJobs

      public int countActiveJobs()
      返回:
      the number of OPEN jobs

    • updateJob

      public void updateJob(String jobId, String title, String moduleCode, String organiser, int minYear, int maxYear, int hours, String requiredSkills, String deadline, int vacancies)
      Updates the editable fields of an existing job. The jobId, organiser, and status fields are not changed by this method.
      参数:
      jobId - the ID of the job to update
      title - new title
      moduleCode - new module code
      organiser - new organiser name
      minYear - new minimum year
      maxYear - new maximum year
      hours - new weekly hours
      requiredSkills - new skill requirements
      deadline - new deadline
      vacancies - new vacancy count

    • deleteJob

      public void deleteJob(String jobId)
      Permanently removes a job from the CSV by ID.
      参数:
      jobId - the ID of the job to delete

    • toggleJobStatus

      public void toggleJobStatus(String jobId)
      Toggles a job's status between OPEN and CLOSED.
      参数:
      jobId - the ID of the job to toggle

    • countAllJobs

      public int countAllJobs()
      返回:
      the total number of jobs

    • countJobsByOrganiser

      public int countJobsByOrganiser(String organiser)
      参数:
      organiser - the organiser name to filter by @return how many jobs belong to this organiser

    • countActiveJobsByOrganiser

      public int countActiveJobsByOrganiser(String organiser)
      参数:
      organiser - the organiser name to filter by @return how many OPEN jobs belong to this organiser

    • calculateMatchScore

      public int calculateMatchScore(String userSkills, String requiredSkills)
      Calculates a match score (0-100) between a TA's skills and a job's required skills. The score is computed as a weighted category match plus a Jaccard similarity bonus.

      Supported match types (in order of priority):

      1. Direct match: user skill exactly equals required skill
      2. Alias match: user skill matches a canonical alias of the required skill
      3. Partial match: user and required skills are in the same category and share a substring (70% weight)
      4. Reverse alias match: required skill matches a canonical alias of a user skill (80% weight)

      Category weights: concept (1.5) > language (1.3) > ml (1.2) > database (1.1) > framework (1.0) > tools (0.9). Jaccard bonus: up to 15 points for overlap between user and required skill sets.

      参数:
      userSkills - pipe-separated TA skill list
      requiredSkills - pipe-separated job skill requirements
      返回:
      an integer score from 0 to 100, or 0 if requiredSkills is blank
